chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-766 of 2023 (Liaquat Ali & others Vs. SSP Naushahro Feroze & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No. 6458/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No. 6459/2023 (Satay) 21-11-2023. Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, advocate for the applicants. Mr. Abdul Qadir Khanzada, advocate for the private respondent. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.-. The applicants by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C have impugned order dated 07-10-2023 passed by learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Naushahro Feroze, whereby he has directed the police to record statement of the private respondent for purpose of FIR. The parties are disputed over matrimonial affairs. Perhaps to satisfy that grudge the private respondent is intending to involve the applicants in a false case under the pretext of abortion and such fact has been lost sight of learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Consequently, the impugned order is set aside, however if so advised the private respondent may file a direct complaint of the incident before the Court having jurisdiction. The instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly together with listed application. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
